title: SoundHound's AI Voice Assistant Rolls Into Jeep Vehicles Across Europe
text: SoundHound has launched its generative AI-powered voice assistant in select Jeep vehicles across European markets. This partnership with Stellantis, Jeep's parent company, represents a significant expansion into the connected mobility segment. The SoundHound Chat AI Automotive system enables drivers and passengers to engage in natural conversations with their vehicle rather than being limited to basic commands. The system integrates contextual awareness and conversational capabilities powered by generative AI technology. The deployment provides visibility across Europe, one of the largest global auto markets, and establishes credibility with a major automaker. Successful adoption could pave the way for wider rollouts across Stellantis brands and other manufacturers. Beyond user experience upgrades, the launch enables opportunities in in-car voice commerce. SoundHound has introduced a hands-free commerce agent that integrates ordering, payments and loyalty into infotainment systems, with the segment potentially generating $35 billion annually for automakers. SOUN shares surged 147.8% over the past year and currently hold a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating.
